name: SymbolInfo
summary: The SymbolInfo class holds symbol information: the symbol file and the symbol index in the symbol file.

constructors.name: SymbolInfo
constructors.summary: Creates a new symbol info instance.

constructors.name: SymbolInfo
constructors.summary: Creates a new symbol info instance.

params.name: SymbolFile
params.doc: The symbol file to be used.

params.name: SymbolIndex
params.doc: The symbol index to be used.

throws.when: Thrown if the symbol index is invalid.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: SymbolFile
properties.summary: Gets or sets the symbol file. E.g. "xsteel".

properties.name: SymbolIndex
properties.summary: Gets or sets the the symbol index. Throws an ArgumentOutOfRangeException if the symbol index is not in the range from 0 to 255.
